# toml++ single-header distribution

`toml.hpp` is the upstream single-header distribution of
[toml++](https://github.com/marzer/tomlplusplus), pinned to commit
`a43ad3787293f4a46b1d70c0924b5a25d10e79fc` from 24 May 2026.

The unmodified file has SHA-256 digest
`e8a56bd3ae26d71c7414615f4d85bce5072077b2e1ca455289211170a541e026`. Its preamble
contains the MIT license, as prescribed for upstream's single-header
distribution.
